pi_items.source: Code analysis: seed_library.py ML_PAPERS list includes 4 additional papers beyond the 4 required titles

privileged_info_summary: The task exports a Zotero collection containing exactly 8 foundational machine learning papers to a CSV file. All four required papers are confirmed to be real: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al. 2017, NeurIPS), BERT (Devlin et al. 2019, NAACL-HLT), ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (Krizhevsky et al. 2012, NIPS), and Deep Learning (LeCun et al. 2015, Nature). The collection also contains Language Models are Few-Shot Learners (Brown et al. 2020), Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition (He et al. 2016), Generative Adversarial Nets (Goodfellow et al. 2014), and Mastering the Game of Go (Silver et al. 2016). The expected CSV file path is /home/ga/Documents/ml_papers.csv. However, the setup script creates a collection named 'ML References' not 'Machine Learning Papers' as the task description claims.
